name: case01_basic_08_pipe_header_footer_win874_job
description: Case 01 Variant 08: Reads pre-converted pipe file (originally space-padded WIN874 CRLF with footer).
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - 08 converted (pipe)","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case01_basic/case01_basic_20260408_08_HF_WIN874_WIN_converted.txt"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":false,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SparkSQL - Cast, Filter Footer","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"ID","Type":"bigint"},{"Name":"PREFIX","Type":"string"},{"Name":"FNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"LNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"AGE","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"BALANCE","Type":"decimal(18,2)"},{"Name":"VERSION_DATE","Type":"date"},{"Name":"ETL_UPDATE_DATE","Type":"timestamp"}]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(ID), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(PREFIX), '') AS PREFIX, NULLIF(TRIM(FNAME), '') AS FNAME, NULLIF(TRIM(LNAME), '') AS LNAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(AGE), '') AS SMALLINT) AS AGE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(BALANCE), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BALANCE, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE TRIM(ID) RLIKE '^[0-9]+$'"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case01_basic/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
